name: civilian-warriors-the-inside-story-of-blackwater-and-the-unsung-heroes-of-the-war-on-terror
description: Erik Prince's account of building Blackwater from a swamp training facility to the world's most controversial private security company.
useCase: Understand private security contracting, crisis management in war zones, and what happens when a company becomes a political target.
knownRisks: Content discusses politically and legally controversial topics
Some sections redacted by CIA review
